jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Medtronic India
jsonLd.description:
Medtronic India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
